subject: Humanoid fighter in Super Saiyan transformation — spiky glowing hair, arms extended forward in a double-blast stance
description: At low resolution, a humanoid male fighter is depicted in an intense battle pose with both arms extended forward, palms out or cupped, as if charging or releasing a double energy blast. The hair is spiky and radiates a bright golden-yellow glow, consistent with a Super Saiyan transformation. Crackling electrical energy or lightning effects surround the figure. The expression reads as fierce and determined. The background is bright with energy flare effects. Due to the low resolution of the source image, finer costume details and facial features are not resolvable.
foreground: humanoid fighter with spiky golden-aura hair, both arms extended forward in double-blast pose
background: bright energy flare, lightning effects, white-yellow burst
emotion: fierce, determined, aggressive — forward battle stance with intense expression
